updates.name: OpenAI Codex App for Windows
updates.description: OpenAI's native desktop coding app lands on Windows with parallel AI agent tasks, PowerShell support, per-task worktrees with diff review, and cross-platform session sync. 500K+ devs were on the waitlist. Paid subscribers get double rate limits through April 2.

updates.name: Cursor Automations
updates.description: Brand-new agentic coding system that auto-launches AI agents triggered by commits, Slack messages, or timers — enabling continuous code review, security audits, and incident response without prompt-and-monitor loops.

updates.name: CollectivIQ
updates.description: World's first AI consensus platform that simultaneously queries ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Grok and up to 10 other LLMs, then synthesizes outputs into one annotated response highlighting where models agree or disagree. Free for 30 days.

updates.name: GPT-5.3 Instant
updates.description: OpenAI's new default ChatGPT model with 26.8% fewer hallucinations, better web search integration woven into contextual answers, and a less preachy conversational tone. Free for all ChatGPT users.

updates.name: Google Flow Unified Workspace
updates.description: Google merged Flow, Whisk, and ImageFX into one AI creative studio with Veo 3.1 video generation, lasso-based natural language editing, and full project migration from Whisk/ImageFX.

updates.name: Perplexity Computer
updates.description: Autonomous multi-agent system that plans, builds, and executes complex workflows using 19 AI models. Creates sub-agents on the fly and can run tasks for hours or months.

updates.name: Notion Custom Agents
updates.description: Autonomous AI agents that automate recurring work across Notion, Slack, Mail, and Calendar. Set a trigger or schedule and they run 24/7. Free to try through May 2026.

updates.name: Gmail AI Overviews (Gemini 3)
updates.description: Gmail's biggest update since 2004 — AI Overviews summarize email threads, a new AI Inbox view reshapes email around summaries and to-dos, plus Help Me Write, Suggested Replies, and Proofread features.

updates.name: Timekettle W4 AI Interpreter Earbuds
updates.description: AI-powered real-time translation earbuds with bone conduction + dual mic pickup, supporting 43 languages and 96 accents online. 18-hour battery. Debuted at MWC 2026 this week.

updates.name: Google Pixel March Drop — AI Icons & Gemini Actions
updates.description: Major Pixel update with AI-generated custom icon styles, Gemini app actions for ordering groceries and restaurant recs, upgraded Circle to Search that identifies everything in images, and Now Playing as a standalone app.
